I have a question about Tawils 'Transcend+Rem' skill in traphouse (one the sets a unit's hp to what they were last turn) - are there any mistranslations or unobvious conditions there? Cause like half of the times when I tried to revive a unit that died on enemy turn nothing happened (and half the times it did work lol)
it revives only once
Thanks, that's probably what it was. Once per hero or once per whole match btw? (so like if I revive 1 hero, can I revive another)
it's *start of the previous turn* state
if u unit was dead *at the start of the previous turn* then tawil cant revive him
u can revive more than once if revived unit was *alive at the start of the previous turn*
